description: Registry of all nosec suppressions in production code. Review quarterly per ADR-007 and issue #137.

suppressions.justification: error code enum, not a password
suppressions.source_line: TOKEN_EXPIRED = "HG_E_TOKEN_EXPIRED"  # nosec B105 — error code enum, not a password

suppressions.justification: error code enum, not a password
suppressions.source_line: TOKEN_INVALID = "HG_E_TOKEN_INVALID"  # nosec B105 — error code enum, not a password

suppressions.justification: path prefix check, not a hardcoded temp dir
suppressions.source_line: if not p.startswith("playground/") and not p.startswith("/tmp/")  # nosec B108 — path prefix check, not a hardcoded temp dir
sample = random.choices(values, k=n)  # nosec B311 — statistical sampling, not cryptographic
sample = random.choices(values, k=n)  # nosec B311 — statistical sampling, not cryptographic
shuffled = random.sample(pooled, len(pooled))  # nosec B311 — permutation test, not cryptographic
